top_values: Recommended Citation: "Global Energy Monitor, Global Wind Power Tracker, February 2026 release" (See the CC license for attribution requirements if sharing or adapting the data set.)
Project Name in Local Language / Script
Owner Name in Local Language / Script
Operator Name in Local Language / Script
onshore, offshore hard mount, offshore floating, offshore mount unknown
Projects smaller than 1 MW not included
Year the project is or is expected to be commissioned
Year the plant is taken offline
Unit or Phase identifier from external dataset
URL of existing or planned GEM.wiki page
True if storage is associated with a project phase
True if a project phase is dedicated for green hydrogen production
The company that operates the project
The company that directly owns the plant
Suspension of operation has been announced. The status is marked as ‘shelved - inferred 2 y’ if no progress has been observed for at least two years.
Subregion location based on United Nations definition
Subnational unit where project is located
Region location based on United Nations definition

Projects that have been publicly reported but have not yet moved actively forward by applying for permits or seeking land, material, or financing. Examples: (1) projects are the potential “Phase II” at a location where “Phase I” is currently under pre-construction, (2) Projects that are described in long-range company or governmental planning documents.
Projects that are actively moving forward in seeking governmental approvals, land rights, or financing.
Prefecture, district, or municipality (China) where project is located
Nameplate capacity, or best available data, of the phase in megawatts
Longitude, assumed WGS84 (google maps), of the project phase
Location is Approximate based on using nearest city or other information in data sources, or Location is Exact when explicitly provided in data source
Roman numerals are changed to numbers. If the Owner uses non-sequential numbers or other characters, those are used.
Preference is for a government provided name. Without that information, the name the owner or operating company uses was taken.
Left blank for local languages use the roman/latin alphabet. Otherwise operator name in local script is included if possible.
Left blank for local languages that use the roman/latin alphabet. Otherwise local name in local script provided if possible.
Left blank for local languages that use the roman/latin alphabet. Otherwise direct owner name included in local script if possible.
Latest date was taken when original data source provided a range; Start years not included for projects that are cancelled or shelved.
Hard mount vs floating is dependant on the depth of the water.
Company that performs day-to-day operations and maintenance of the project.
